channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: New motorsports leadership executives introduced as Andretti Global moves on without Andretti
item.description: The Associated Press has learned that two longtime NASCAR executives have been introduced at Andretti Global as part of the restructuring now that Michael Andretti has stepped aside.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: What playoff seeds Detroit Lions would get if they finish any possible combination of 4-1 or 3-2
item.description: Here's what playoff seeds the Detroit Lions would get in every possible combination of finishing the regular season 4-1 or 3-2.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Injury-ravaged Detroit Lions aim to extend winning streak vs. division foe on Thursday Night Football
item.description: The Detroit Lions are riding a 10-game winning streak but are one win away from setting a franchise record. But standing in their way is the vaunted Green Bay Packers, who are riding a three-game winning streak ahead of TNF.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Wiggins, Schieffelin and Clemson's defense hold down No. 4 Kentucky for a 70-66 win
item.description: Chauncey Wiggins scored 12 points and Ian Schieffelin had 11 points and a career-high 20 rebounds as Clemson shut down No. 4 Kentucky for a 70-66 victory in the SEC/ACC Challenge.
item.dc:creator: Pete Iacobelli, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Iowa State and SMU athletic directors in a 'stay off my lawn' moment regarding latest rankings
item.description: Athletic directors at Iowa State and SMU are in a turf war over the latest College Football Playoff rankings, leading to a “stay off my lawn" moment on social media. The background: SMU, at 11-1 and riding a nine-game winning streak into the Atlantic Coast Conference title game, was slotted at No.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: St. John's to honor late coach Lou Carnesecca at men's and women's games this weekend
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The men's and women's basketball teams at St. John's will wear “Lou” patches on their uniform jerseys for the rest of this season to honor Hall of Fame coach Lou Carnesecca, who died Saturday at age 99. A funeral mass at St.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tom Brady explains why he has 'mixed emotions' after seeing Azeez Al-Shaair's brutal hit on Trevor Lawrence
item.description: Tom Brady gave his opinion on the Azeez Al-Shaair hit against Trevor Lawrence, which led to an NFL suspension, and he questioned why the defense is always the ones at fault.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Padres catcher Kyle Higashioka signs with Texas Rangers
item.description: Free agent catcher Kyle Higashioka and the Texas Rangers agreed Monday night on a $13.5 million, two-year contract that includes a mutual option for the 2027 season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: A Rays move to Ybor City could still be possible
item.description: For months, the Tampa Bay Rays celebrated the signing of a deal between their group, the city of St. Petersburg, and the Pinellas County Commission.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Little G: 12-year-old skateboarding prodigy aims for SLS and Olympic gold
item.description: Guerlain Girardin, also known as Little G, is a 12-year-old skateboarder who skates 7 days a week. He has already won the European championship and the California games in the U14 category.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: High school recruiting isn't the only way to build a winner in the era of the transfer portal
item.description: Texas A&M signed the nation’s top-ranked recruiting class three years ago believing it had built a potential national title contender. Plenty of players from that heralded 2022 class could indeed be participating in the first 12-team College Football Playoff this month.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ryggs Johnston goes from a tiny Montana town to Australian Open champion: Analysis
item.description: A pair of Americans delivered command performances halfway around the world during Thanksgiving week. One was Peter Uihlein, the former U.S. Amateur champion and two-time Walker Cup player, winning by five shots in Qatar on the Asian Tour.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2024 PPR All 51 Team
item.description: 2024 PPR All 51 Team: Each season our selection committee recognizes the best players from across the county, assembling our "All 51" team. This list includes our first team picks, and honorable mentions.
item.dc:creator: Maddy Worley, Fox 5

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil season games, home opener
item.description: (KRON) – The newest Bay Area major pro sports team, the Golden State Valkyries, has announced the date of its inaugural season at the Chase Center on Monday. The inaugural game, slated for May 16 of next year, will be a California battle with the Valkyries facing the Los Angeles Sparks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Saquon Barkley vs. Derrick Henry was never supposed to be a head-to-head matchup. “It ain't basketball. It ain't like I go out there and tackle Derrick Henry,” Barkley said. “To be honest, I don't know if I really want to tackle Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Monahan with goal and assist, Blue Jackets extend points streak to 6 with 6-3 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Sean Monahan had a goal and assist, and the Columbus Blue Jackets extended their points streak to six games with a 6-3 win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU eliminated from Big 12 contention, beats Houston
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU learned it was eliminated from Big 12 Championship Game contention at halftime, but the Cougars still had a job to do. Jake Retzlaff ran for two touchdowns and threw for 167 yards to lead No. 19 BYU to a 30-18 victory over Houston on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montrose def. Pueblo West 18-7 to advance to the championship game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Montrose Red Hawks are heading to the Class 4A state championship game after defeating the Pueblo West Cyclones 18-7 in a hard-fought semifinal matchup.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Utes women upset #3 Notre Dame, 78-67
item.description: GEORGE TOWN, CAYMAN ISLANDS — The Utah women's basketball team picked up their highest ranked win outside of the Huntsman Center in school history by taking down No. 3 Notre Dame, 78-67, in the final game of the Cayman Island Classic.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
